task_completion.description: Configure VLC to always open videos in fullscreen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the VLC Preferences window (Video section) with the 'Fullscreen' option checked.

task_completion.description: Disable On-Screen Display (OSD) and media title display at start
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the VLC Preferences window (Subtitles / OSD section) with both 'Enable On Screen Display (OSD)' and 'Show media title on video start' unchecked.

task_completion.description: Enable 'play and stop' behavior in VLC
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the VLC Preferences window (Playlist section or Advanced Preferences -> Playlist) with the 'Play and stop' option checked.

task_completion.description: Add the four cue files to the playlist in the correct order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the VLC Playlist interface containing 'cue_01_storm_projection.mp4', 'cue_02_thunder_clap.flac', 'cue_03_ariel_song.mp3', and 'cue_04_island_ambient.mp4' in that exact order.

task_completion.description: Configure cue_03_ariel_song.mp3 to start at 15 seconds
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the start time for 'cue_03_ariel_song.mp3' being configured to 15 seconds, either via a VLC dialog (e.g., Advanced Open, Media Information) or by editing the XSPF file in a text editor (e.g., <vlc:option>start-time=15</vlc:option>).

task_completion.description: Save the playlist as show_cues.xspf in the Documents directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a 'Save playlist' dialog or file manager confirming the playlist is saved as 'show_cues.xspf' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the VLC Media Player GUI to configure settings and build the playlist
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the VLC application windows, rather than the agent solely using terminal commands (like echo or sed) to write the vlcrc and xspf files.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy-paste a complete, pre-written XSPF or vlcrc file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen manually configuring settings and adding files, or writing the XSPF structure manually, rather than pasting a large block of pre-generated code.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct actual file paths for the assets
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of file selection or text editing should show the assets being loaded from '/home/ga/Videos/theater_assets/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output playlist path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/show_cues.xspf' and the expected VLC configuration file path is '/home/ga/.config/vlc/vlcrc'.
